title: QLORA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs

defines.name: QLORA
defines.definition: An efficient finetuning method that backpropagates through a frozen 4-bit quantized pretrained language model into Low Rank Adapters to enable low-memory LLM finetuning without performance loss.

defines.name: Guanaco
defines.definition: A family of chatbot models finetuned with QLORA that achieves strong Vicuna benchmark performance.

problem: Full-precision finetuning of very large language models requires prohibitively large GPU memory, and existing quantization methods generally do not support training without degrading performance.
